name: Passover Varenikas
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the mashed potatoes, matzo cake meal, 3 eggs, and seasonings (salt and pepper) in a large bowl.
2. Form the mixture into small balls.
3. Make a depression in each ball and fill with chopped cooked beef.
4. Enclose the meat filling within the potato mixture.
5. Flatten the balls slightly.
6. Dip each ball first in egg, then in matzo meal.
7. Fry the varenikas until they are browned on all sides.
